subject: Cannot login after password reset
description: Customer reset password twice yesterday; new link always says expired. Browser Chrome 128 on Windows.

subject: Double charged on monthly invoice
description: Invoice #4821 charged twice on the 1st. Need refund of one charge and a corrected receipt.

subject: Feature request: dark mode for dashboard
description: Several power users asked for a dark theme. Prefer system-preference toggle over a separate site.

subject: API keys not working in production
description: Prod API key returns 401 since Tuesday deploy. Staging key still works. Need root-cause before standup.

subject: SSO login loop for enterprise org
description: Enterprise IdP SSO redirects back to login after Okta assert. Affects 40 seats on the Acme tenant.

subject: Export CSV times out on large projects
description: Project export with 50k rows never finishes; spinner for 10+ minutes then blank page.

subject: Webhook delivery failures overnight
description: Outbound webhooks to customer CRM failed overnight with 502s. Retry queue is growing.

subject: Account owner transfer stuck pending
description: Owner transfer form submits but status stays pending. New owner never receives invite email.
